features: COMPLETE GROOMING KIT: Our 5-piece manicure set includes everything you need for the perfect nail care routine. With a pair of nail clippers, nail scissors, tweezers, nail file, and a cuticle stick, you're fully equipped to maintain neat nails with ease.
PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIALS: Crafted from high-grade metal for durability and long-lasting use. Each tool is designed to deliver precision and ease while grooming your nails.

PORTABLE CONVENIENCE: Comes with a sleek, handy plastic carry pouch, making it easy to store or take on the go. Whether you’re at home or traveling, your nail care essentials are organized and within reach.

VERSATILE USE FOR EVERYONE: Ideal for use by both men and women, the set caters to anyone looking for a comprehensive solution to nail maintenance. It’s the perfect kit for keeping your hands and feet looking their best.

GIFT GROOMING: Makes a great gift for any occasion, birthdays, holidays, or just because. Give the gift of grooming to a friend, or family member, or treat yourself to a manicure set that combines functionality with style.
description: Product Description - Each set contains a pair of nail clippers, a pair of nail scissors, a pair of tweezers, a nail file and a cuticle stick. Each tool has its own functions that can meet all kinds of your nail care grooming needs and brings much convenience for daily care. Safety Warning No warning applicable
